seo.title: AI Short Film Generator for Sci-Fi Storytelling | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create sci-fi short films with AI, from concept art and storyboard to cinematic final shots. Ideal for creators exploring robotics and future narratives.

hero.title: CONNECT Film
hero.description: Build complete sci-fi short films in one workflow. Create robot concepts, generate scene-by-scene storyboards, and produce cinematic videos from a clear narrative prompt.

steps.title: Describe your film concept and theme
steps.description: Enter your creative brief—like exploring robot consciousness with 12 shots including assembly closeups, material textures, body movements, and mysterious atmospheric visuals with cold, high-end, delicate aesthetics.

steps.title: AI generates storyboard script
steps.description: Multiple LLMs (GPT-4o Mini, Gemini 3) work together to create a detailed shot-by-shot storyboard script based on your concept, defining camera angles, movements, and visual style.

steps.title: Design your robot character
steps.description: Upload reference images and style descriptions. Nano Banana Pro creates futuristic robot designs with biomorphic organic forms, frosted shells, translucent materials, and intricate mechanical details.

steps.title: Generate cinematic storyboard frames
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro renders each storyboard frame with your robot character, maintaining consistency across shots with cold tones, textured closeups, and cinematic depth of field.

steps.title: Produce final animated videos
steps.description: Sora 2 and VEO 3 bring your storyboards to life—generating 15-25 second animated clips for each scene that you can assemble into your complete short film.

whoIsFor.title: Perfect for filmmakers and creative visionaries
whoIsFor.subtitle: From independent directors to brand storytellers, see who creates sci-fi films with AI.

audiences.label: Independent filmmakers
audiences.description: Produce high-quality sci-fi short films without expensive CGI studios or animation teams—bring your creative visions to life affordably.

audiences.label: Concept artists & designers
audiences.description: Visualize futuristic robot designs and create animated concept films to pitch ideas to clients, studios, or collaborators.

audiences.label: Brand content creators
audiences.description: Create premium sci-fi branded content and product films that showcase innovation and cutting-edge technology aesthetics.

audiences.label: Social media creators
audiences.description: Produce viral-worthy sci-fi content with stunning visual effects that captivates audiences and builds your creative reputation.

items.question: What is the CONNECT Film workflow?
items.answer: CONNECT Film is an AI workflow for creating cinematic sci-fi short films. It handles the entire process from concept to final video: script generation, robot character design, storyboard creation, and video production using Nano Banana Pro, Sora 2, and VEO 3.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses GPT-4o Mini and Gemini 3 for script and storyboard generation, Nano Banana Pro for robot design and frame rendering, and both Sora 2 and VEO 3 for final video animation with character consistency.

items.question: What input do I need to start?
items.answer: You need a text description of your film concept (theme, shot count, visual style) and reference images for robot design inspiration. The AI handles script writing, character design, and video production.

items.question: What kind of output can I expect?
items.answer: You get a complete storyboard with multiple frames, a consistent robot character design, and animated video clips (15-25 seconds each) that you can assemble into your final short film.

items.question: Can I customize the robot design style?
items.answer: Yes. Provide reference images and style descriptions (biomorphic, frosted shell, translucent, minimalist) to guide Nano Banana Pro in creating your unique robot character with consistent design across all frames.

items.question: How does character consistency work?
items.answer: The workflow generates a robot three-view design sheet first, then uses this reference across all storyboard frames and video generation to maintain visual consistency throughout your film.

items.question: What video lengths are supported?
items.answer: Each scene generates 8-25 second video clips depending on the model used. Sora 2 produces up to 12 seconds per clip, while VEO 3 can generate 8-second clips with different visual styles.

items.question: How are credits calculated?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on script generation, image creation (robot design + storyboard frames), and video generation with Sora 2 and VEO 3. Complex multi-scene films use more credits.
